Off Calendar Oct-06-2025 Continued To Jan-05-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Christopher Johnson appeared via zoom for David Devine (petitioner).

Mr. Johnson stated that he is waiting on his client to send him the date of death statement, that he more time to get waivers from parties. The matter is continued to January 5, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Josh Fredricks. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Espin. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-28-2025 Continued To Oct-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Chris Johnson, Esq., for Petitioners.
No other appearances.

At the court's query, counsel offers status of the Estate. Counsel confirms that he hopes to obtain and file a final waiver of accounting within six (6) weeks which should allow for the filing of a Petition for Final Distribution.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Oct-06-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Apr-22-2024 Continued To May-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 2, 2008 is admitted to probate. David B. Devine is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for November 18, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Napata: Not reported.
